prompt: Create an ultra-realistic macro fantasy portrait of a tiny toddler girl standing and happily hugging an enormous Cadbury Dairy Milk chocolate bar that is nearly twice her height. The child has adorable chubby cheeks, large sparkling brown eyes, a joyful open smile, long dark black-brown hair tied in a high ponytail with small flower hair clips, and chocolate smeared across her cheeks, nose, lips, hands, and sweater. She wears a cream chunky-knit sweater, brown corduroy overalls with buttons and a small teddy-bear patch on the front pocket, and tan lace-up toddler boots. Show one adult hand entering from the left, gently holding or adjusting the back of the toddler’s overall strap for scale. The giant chocolate bar is partially unwrapped: glossy metallic purple wrapper with crinkled silver foil at the top, large readable yellow and white text saying Cadbury Dairy Milk, and a raised milk splash graphic. The top of the bar is exposed as thick glossy milk chocolate squares embossed with Cadbury; the upper right edge has a big bite taken out of it, with melted chocolate dripping down the squares and wrapper. Include exactly 10 large visible chocolate squares on the exposed bar, scattered broken chocolate pieces and crumbs on the tabletop, and shiny chocolate puddles around the base. Use warm golden studio lighting, creamy circular bokeh lights in the background, shallow depth of field, macro lens realism, high detail skin texture, realistic fabric fibers, reflective crinkled foil, rich purple packaging, playful fantasy scale, cozy celebratory atmosphere, vertical 4:5 composition, toddler positioned left-center and giant chocolate bar right-center. Avoid extra people, avoid distorted hands, avoid incorrect text, and keep the image photorealistic rather than cartoonish.
